title: Marbled's Arsenal (Legacy)
description: A mod that adds modern military and tactical armors
body:
[![BH Partner](https://i.postimg.cc/cJwynrYz/mhs-partnerbanner.png)](https://bisecthosting.com/marbledhubb?r=Modrinth)

![Marbled's Arsenal Banner](https://i.postimg.cc/2jgvf8xZ/image.png)

**Marbled's Arsenal (Legacy)** is a mod for Forge 1.16.5+ that adds tactical and militaristic armours (and melee weapons 1.16.5-1.19.2) while aiming to be vanilla friendly. A project from MarbledHubb Studios. REQUIRES GECKOLIB & 1.19.2+ MISCELLANEOUS METALS (Formerly Marbled's Core). Incompatible with OptiFine.

This mod is now discontinued as of 10/18/2025. A recontinuation/successor mod is currently being developed. [See this tweet for more information.](https://x.com/marbledhubb/status/2014899653121093995)

## **Features**

- CM-6M Gas Mask (+ helmet variations)
- CM-7M Gas Mask (+ helmet variations)
- CM-8M Gas Mask (+ helmet variations)
- Combat Helmet (+ helmet variations)
- Military Berets (Red, Black, UN)
- Tactical Carriers (Olive, Black. Light, Heavy)
- Hazmat Armor
- Riot Armor
- SWAT Armor
- Military Armors (Desert camo, Winter camo)
- Juggernaut Armors (Olive, Black)
- Ghillie Armors (All leaf variants)
- Melee weapons (1.19.2-)

## **Usage**

- You may use this in your modpacks, no credit required but it would be apprecated.
- You may use this in your video, no credit required but it would be appreciated.
- You may NOT re-distribute this mod or its assets ANYWHERE. 

MarbledHubb Studios is proudly partnered with [BisectHosting!](https://bisecthosting.com/marbledhubb?r=Modrinth) When using our code "marbledhubb", you are saving 25% off any gaming server while supporting us by commission, supporting the development of our projects!
